name: techtideai
description: Company-scale AI agent operating system. Typed Mastra (TypeScript) and LangGraph (Python) runtimes, 1 CEO + 10 orchestrators + 50 workers, three-agent adversarial harness, four-axis grader, plateau scorer, human-in-the-loop approval gate, OpenTelemetry traces, and a 33-task golden eval suite.

scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
